text:
Liberio at Night Pf&Vln ver. is the 20th track on the "Attack on Titan" The Final Season Original Soundtrack, as well as the 9th track on disc 3 of the "Attack on Titan" The Final Season Original Soundtrack Complete Album. It was composed and arranged by Kohta Yamamoto.

Musical motifs

The track is a remix of Liberio at Night.

fr:Liberio at Night Pf & VIn ver.
